2603.22879.title: Confidence Calibration under Ambiguous Ground Truth
2603.22879.paper_summary: Confidence calibration assumes a unique ground-truth label per input, yet this assumption fails wherever annotators genuinely disagree. Post-hoc calibrators fitted on majority-voted labels, the standard single-label targets used in practice, can appear well-calibrated under conventional evaluation yet remain substantially miscalibrated against the underlying annotator distribution. We show that this failure is structural: under simplifying assumptions, Temperature Scaling is biased toward temperatures that underestimate annotator uncertainty, with true-label miscalibration increasing monotonically with annotation entropy. To address this, we develop a family of ambiguity-aware post-hoc calibrators that optimise proper scoring rules against the full label distribution and require no model retraining. Our methods span progressively weaker annotation requirements: Dirichlet-Soft leverages the full annotator distribution and achieves the best overall calibration quality across settings; Monte Carlo Temperature Scaling with a single annotation per example (MCTS S=1) matches full-distribution calibration across all benchmarks, demonstrating that pre-aggregated label distributions are unnecessary; and Label-Smooth Temperature Scaling (LS-TS) operates with voted labels alone by constructing data-driven pseudo-soft targets from the model's own confidence. Experiments on four benchmarks with real multi-annotator distributions (CIFAR-10H, ChaosNLI) and clinically-informed synthetic annotations (ISIC~2019, DermaMNIST) show that Dirichlet-Soft reduces true-label ECE by 55-87% relative to Temperature Scaling, while LS-TS reduces ECE by 9-77% without any annotator data.
2603.22879.paper_summary_zh: 信心校準假設每個輸入都有唯一的真實標籤，但當標註者真實不一致時，這一假設就會失效。基於多數投票標籤擬合的事後校準器，這是實踐中使用的標準單標籤目標，在傳統評估下可能看起來校準良好，但在基礎標註者分佈下仍然顯著失校準。我們表明這一失敗是結構性的：在簡化假設下，溫度縮放對低估標註者不確定性的溫度存在偏見，真實標籤的失校準隨著標註熵的增加而單調上升。為了解決這個問題，我們開發了一系列具備模糊性意識的事後校準器，這些校準器針對完整標籤分佈優化適當的評分規則，且不需要重新訓練模型。我們的方法涵蓋了逐步減弱的標註要求：Dirichlet-Soft 利用完整的標註者分佈，在各種設置中達到最佳的整體校準質量；每個示例只有一個標註的蒙特卡羅溫度縮放（MCTS S=1）在所有基準上匹配完整分佈校準，顯示預先聚合的標籤分佈是不必要的；而標籤平滑溫度縮放（LS-TS）僅通過從模型自身的信心構建數據驅動的伪軟目標來運作。對四個基準的實驗，使用真實的多標註者分佈（CIFAR-10H，ChaosNLI）和臨床知情的合成標註（ISIC~2019，DermaMNIST）顯示，Dirichlet-Soft 相對於溫度縮放將真實標籤的 ECE 降低了 55-87%，而 LS-TS 在沒有任何標註者數據的情況下將 ECE 降低了 9-77%。
2603.22879.author: Linwei Tao et.al.
2603.22879.authors: Linwei Tao, Haoyang Luo, Minjing Dong, Chang Xu
